last_item: Wire the verify gate into the loop reality (make verify / verify-web / fmt-check)
last_result: done — verified full web gate green from fresh npm ci (deterministic build, tree clean); made the gate executable via make verify/verify-web/fmt-check; AGENTS.md updated; reviewer's blocking finding (fmt-check swallowed gofmt's non-zero exit) fixed; make verify green
notes: Foundation band (band 0) complete. Now in band 1 (security). Next: pick the highest-risk security item — audit session auth (HttpOnly/SameSite/Secure cookies, expiry/rotation, server-side logout invalidation) in internal/auth, with tests per property.
north_star: An indie hacker can stand up and run a rock-solid Postgres entirely from the indiepg UI, on best defaults, with safe optional overrides.
